creator: mrspock@esfm.ipn.mx
text:
Login classes have been defined in 2.2.2 release.
The login process reports that "root" has no class defined.

Fix: 

Create the file: /etc/login.conf
this file may contain:
------------------------------
root:

default:

------------------------------
How-To-Repeat: Using the Walnut Creek CD standard installation, 
try to make a login as root.
The system complains in the console.
